scope.summary: Split the doctor authentication capability and IAM-source diagnostic seam into a private child module without changing rendered doctor output, redaction, or exit-code behavior.
out_of_scope: Other C6 splits, including dispatch/tests.rs, http/operator.rs, service_lifecycle.rs, classifier.rs, lane.rs, App.tsx, and main.rs
Live Oracle doctor output; this close uses offline/unit/golden proof only

entry_points.name: source split commit
entry_points.trace: `git show --stat --name-status b0833a8ce02ee0cc08796cc475d89b9756eb945a` shows doctor.rs split into doctor/auth.rs and scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh updated in the same commit; doctor.rs ratchet lowered to the measured 5400 lines.

entry_points.name: scoped compile
entry_points.trace: `timeout 180s env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo check -p oraclemcp-core` exited 0 after the split.

entry_points.name: oraclemcp doctor auth capability rendering
entry_points.trace: `timeout 180s env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp-core doctor::tests::auth_capability_matrix_is_thin_and_redaction_safe -- --exact` exited 0: 1 passed. The test asserts rendered JSON/text omit dbhost:1521/private_service, APP_USER, super_secret, MCP_PROXY, APP_OWNER, /wallets/private, wallet_secret, CN=private-db, iam.jwt.token, and another.secret.token.

entry_points.name: oraclemcp doctor redaction filter
entry_points.trace: `timeout 180s env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp-core redacts` exited 0: 5 passed. Included doctor::tests::connection_error_redacts_profile_sensitive_values and doctor::tests::iam_token_refresh_failure_redacts_jwt, preserving credential_ref wording without exposing configured credential values.

entry_points.name: oraclemcp doctor connectivity failure golden
entry_points.trace: `timeout 180s env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --test doctor_secret_golden` exited 0: doctor_connectivity_failure_secret_redaction_golden passed.

limitations: The doctor.rs source split and doctor.rs ratchet landed together in b0833a8ce02ee0cc08796cc475d89b9756eb945a; current shared-tree scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh also has an unrelated main.rs ratchet hunk that depends on uncommitted main.rs split work and is not part of this close.
A full arch-fitness run on current HEAD is red on out-of-scope crates/oraclemcp/src/dispatch/tests.rs: committed file has 15703 lines versus ratchet 15676.
Tree is not globally clean because other panes have C5/service-lifecycle/doc-plan work in progress; in-scope doctor source paths are clean at source.

known_defects.description: Current committed arch-fitness ratchet violation for crates/oraclemcp/src/dispatch/tests.rs: committed file has 15703 lines versus ratchet 15676.
